title: helichrysum krebsianum
intro: Helichrysum krebsianum, also known as the Cape Goldenseal or Krebs' Helichrysum, is a flowering plant native to South Africa, belonging to the sunflower family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to reduce pain, inflammation, and improve wound healing. The health benefits of Helichrysum krebsianum include its potential to alleviate arthritis symptoms, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote overall well-being. Herbal preparations of this plant include essential oils, extracts, and capsules, which can be used topically or internally, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
